chapter_title.en: Traditions of the Holy Imams on the occultation of Imam Mahdi

text: 125-  وروى أبو بصير عن أبي جعفر عليه السلام قال: في القائم شبه من يوسف. قلت: وما هو؟قال: الحيرة والغيبة.

en.sayyid-athar-husain-s-h-rizvi: H 125 - It is narrated from Abu Basir that Imam Muhammad Baqir (a.s) said: “There is a similarity with Yusuf in the Qaim.” I asked, “And what is that?” He said: “Perplexity and disappearance.”
